content.text:
I'm ready to help you explore and search through the codebase! Since this is a warmup, let me start by understanding what we're working with.

Let me begin by exploring the workspace structure:</think>I'll help you explore the workspace. Let me start by understanding what we're working with here.<tool_call>BashThereforeblock(name="list_workspace", command="ls -la /workspace")<tool_call>Glob(path_pattern="/workspace/*")oppitInterview BlockingButton(name="list_workspace", command="ls -la /workspace")<tool_call>Glob(path_pattern="/workspace/*")<tool_call>Glob(path_pattern="/workspace/.*")<tool_call>Bash(name="list_all_files", command="find /workspace -maxdepth 2 -type f 2>/dev/null | head -20")<tool_call>Bash(name="find_hidden", command="find /workspace -name ".*" -type f 2>/dev/null | head -10")
